feed.title: U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit — Local Rules
feed.subtitle: First Circuit Local Rules and Internal Operating Procedures governing appeals from the District of Maine. Prose/link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so rule amendments surface as change items.

entry.title: Monitoring started: U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit — Local Rules
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
